card1Text: Become fluent while diving into new cultures and worldviews

card2.title: Connect with your interests
card2.paragraph: Incorporate Spanish seamlessly into your daily routine, hobbies, and passions

card2.title: Learn by doing
card2.paragraph: Boost your fluency through projects, activities, and conversations

card2.title: Travel and explore culture
card2.paragraph: Explore Spanish-speaking countries with our teachers and tour guides

card2.title: Join our community
card2.paragraph: Engage in conversations about your favorite topics in Spanish

card3Text: Enhance your Spanish skills wherever you are, at your own pace. Immerse yourself in a full Spanish course tailored to your proficiency level, featuring:
card3Text2: Additionally, you have the option to schedule personalized lessons with our experienced teachers to dig into any topic.

card4.title: What we offer
card4.text: Discover the services we've designed especially for you

card4.title: OUR PROGRAMS
card4.text: Explore our programs and broaden your perspective
card4.paragraph: Achieve fluency in Spanish with courses tailored to your level and goals. Enjoy interactive lessons with teachers passionate about culture and the language.
list: Customized courses according to your Spanish level.

card4.title: EXPLORE CÓRDOBA
card4.text: Discover the beauty of Córdoba with our in-person activities
card4.paragraph: Immerse yourself in the culture of Córdoba while perfecting your Spanish. Experience a blend of learning and tourism in this beautiful province of Argentina.
card4.paragraph2: You will have the opportunity to:
list: Discover iconic places through immersion in the local culture.
Enjoy exclusive events and activities unique to Español con E.
Practice Spanish with native speakers and meet new people.
card4.button: Sign up to receive exclusive information
card4.messageModal: Live the unique experience of language tourism. Find out more about our trip in April 2024. Sign up to receive exclusive information.
card4.name: Enter your name

card42.title: Discover our early bird plans
card42.text: Unlock the perks of being among our first users for a limited time. Try our platform’s features and exclusive programs.

card43Title: Experience language and culture in Córdoba
card43SubTitle: Get to know this beautiful province of Argentina while perfecting your Spanish.
card43Paragraph0: Join our trip in June 2024 and enjoy a unique mix of learning and tourism. You will have the opportunity to:
card43List: Discover iconic places through immersion in the local culture.
Enjoy Español con E’s exclusive events and activities.
Practice Spanish with native speakers and meet new people.
card43Paragraph1: Become one of the first to receive exclusive information and save your spot!

card6.title: Don't take our word for it
card6.sentence: Read what our students have to say about their experience with us.

card6.name: Lisa J.
card6.paragraph: Before studying with Espanol con E, I had an intermediate level of Spanish. However, since I have been studying with them, I feel my Spanish skills have remarkably improved.  As a physician, my goal was and is to be able to communicate with my Spanish speaking patients.  Thanks to Espanol con E, I am much more fluent and confident in my Spanish communication skills.  ¡Muchísimas gracias a Espanol con E!

card6.name: Tom C.
card6.paragraph: My experience with Español con E has been excelente!  The learning is targeted to meet the needs of each individual student.  There is always a focus on keeping it fun.  During my on-line session Eucaris is always cheerful, patient, and encouraging.  I've been studying Spanish as a personal interest for years, and this is the best class experience I have had.  I am able to utilize the skills in everyday life in Houston, TX and also during my time as a volunteer.  In addition, I think learning a second language is good exercise for the brain.  Te lo recomiendo mucho Español con E.

card6.name: Kayla D.
card6.paragraph: My daughters and I have been studying Spanish with Eucaris for more than two years now, and we have all improved so much. I think we've stuck with our studies this long because Eucaris offers lessons that consider our individual interests and language needs. She has pushed me to work toward goals to use my Spanish skills in my job, and she supports me in reaching those goals through relevant activities, assignments, and feedback. Español with E is helping my family become truly bilingual!

card6.name: Dave B.
card6.paragraph: It has been almost two years that I have been learning Spanish with Español Con E (Señora Rodríguez). I had some basic knowledge of Spanish, however ever since I started with Español con E my Spanish skills have incredibly improved. It has been a long time dream of mine to be able to speak, and write Spanish. I can honestly say that it has been a wonderful experience. At times very challenging, but we’ve worked through it all with her patience, professionalism, honesty, and most of all her sincerity. I have the outmost respect for her and her organization.Thank you.
